paper_title: Robust and Efficient Medical Imaging with Self-Supervision
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (, bit_common, bit_hyperrule, bit_jax, bit_pytorch, bit_tf2, flax, input_pipeline_tf2_or_jax, jax, resource (+6 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: bit_tf2/requirements.txt, bit_jax/requirements.txt, bit_pytorch/requirements.txt
